title: 3 Stocks Flashing Rare Buy Signals After the Market’s Wildest Month
author: Bridget Bennett
description: Following extreme market volatility with the S&P 500 swinging nearly 10% down then recovering to new highs, a machine-learning trading system has identified three stocks with rare bullish signals. United Airlines, DT Midstream, and Astera Labs are flagged with high-quality mean reversion and momentum patterns showing historical win rates around 90% and average returns between 6-27%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Flagged with bullish pivot signal (mean reversion setup) scoring 98.82/100 quality with 92.41% historical accuracy, 6.66% average return, and 8% target exit
Identified with oversold fingerprint signal scoring 95.63 quality, 8.85% average return, 9-in-10 win rate, and under 4% historical max loss; caveat is lower liquidity due to small-cap status

Tagged with sprint momentum signal scoring near 100 quality, 27.22% average return, 9-in-10 win rate; however, carries higher risk with recent losses on this pattern and 5% recent pullback noted as potential second entry

title: DT Midstream Announces Closing of Midwest Pipeline Acquisition
author: Globe Newswire
description: DT Midstream has successfully closed the acquisition of a portfolio of three FERC-regulated natural gas transmission pipelines from ONEOK for $1.2 billion. The acquired pipelines have a total capacity of more than 3.7 Bcf/d and will increase DT Midstream's pipeline segment revenue.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The acquisition aligns with DT Midstream's natural gas strategy and increases its pipeline segment revenue, which is supported by take-or-pay contracts with strong utility customers.
ONEOK sold the pipeline assets to DT Midstream, which is a strategic move for the company but does not indicate a strong positive or negative sentiment.

title: CORRECTION - DT Midstream Announces $1.2 Billion Acquisition of Strategic Midwest FERC-Regulated Natural Gas Pipelines
author: Globe Newswire
description: DT Midstream announced the acquisition of three FERC-regulated natural gas transmission pipelines from ONEOK for $1.2 billion. The acquisition is expected to be immediately accretive to Distributable Cash Flow and increase DT Midstream's pipeline segment to approximately 70% of Adjusted EBITDA in 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the strategic benefits of the acquisition for DT Midstream, including increased scale, revenue contribution from the pipeline segment, and accretion to Distributable Cash Flow. The acquisition aligns with DT Midstream's strategy of owning natural gas assets connecting supply and demand centers.

The article does not provide a clear sentiment for ONEOK, as it is simply mentioned as the seller of the pipeline assets to DT Midstream. The focus of the article is on the benefits of the acquisition for DT Midstream.

title: CORRECTION - DT Midstream Announces $1.2 Billion Acquisition of Strategic Midwest FERC-Regulated Natural Gas Pipelines
author: Dt Midstream, Inc.
description: DT Midstream announced the acquisition of three FERC-regulated natural gas transmission pipelines from ONEOK for $1.2 billion. The acquisition will expand DT Midstream's pipeline segment and increase its presence in the Midwest market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights DT Midstream's strategic acquisition of natural gas pipelines, which is expected to be immediately accretive to its Distributable Cash Flow and increase its pipeline segment contribution. This suggests the company is making a positive move to expand its business and strengthen its position in the Midwest market.
The article does not provide any specific information about ONEOK's perspective on the transaction, so a neutral sentiment is assigned as the company is simply the seller in this deal.

title: DT Midstream Announces Proposed Public Offering of Common Stock
author: N/A
description: DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) announced a $300 million public offering of common stock to fund the acquisition of Guardian Pipeline, Midwestern Gas Transmission, and Viking Gas Transmission from ONEOK Partners Intermediate Limited Partnership and Border Midwestern Company.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is raising funds through a public offering to finance an acquisition, which suggests growth and expansion plans.
